## Summary

Three fixes for the Revision Cockpit workbench:

1. **Variant prose quality** — Strengthened Pass 3 and Polish Pass prompts with explicit WRONG/RIGHT examples requiring character names, scene details, and voice-matched prose. Added abstract beat-sheet detection patterns to `reviseCardContract` validation so vague editorial prose ("The moment held for one clear beat...") is caught and blocked.

2. **Ledger layout** — Collapsed the revision ledger to show only the last completed row by default with an Expand/Collapse toggle. The workspace (original passage + A/B/C recommendations) is now fully visible without scrolling.

3. **Custom revision save UX** — The "Write your custom..." footer button no longer resets text when clicked again. When the textarea is open with content, the button becomes "Save Custom" and commits the custom revision to the ledger directly.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass3-synthesis.ts` — candidate text instructions
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/polish-pass.ts` — candidate text rules
- `lib/revision/reviseCardContract.ts` — META_EDITORIAL_PATTERNS + FORBIDDEN_META_SUGGESTIONS
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientWorkflowV2.tsx` — ledger collapse logic
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientWorkflowV1.tsx` — custom save UX
- `tests/evaluation/pipeline/prompt-pack.test.ts` — budget bump + copy-paste assertion

**Does NOT touch:** pipeline execution, scoring logic, chunk processing, seed generation.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Prompt changes only affect future evaluations; existing results unchanged
- Ledger collapse is DOM-manipulation in V2 wrapper; reverts gracefully if structure changes
- Custom save button dual-purpose behavior is additive (existing "Save custom + ledger" button inside textarea still works as before)

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — prompt wording changes do not alter pipeline flow or scoring algorithm. Validation pattern additions only tighten the existing copy-paste-readiness gate.
